productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel square case Dial style: Black circular dial with white hands Strap style: Black textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 4 hour mark, white highlight on all the hour marks and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
